title: thelycrania baileyi
intro: Thelycrania baileyi, also known as the Bailey's gem or Australian greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Thelycrania baileyi is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, as well as protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas or infusions, and it is also used in traditional remedies in small doses under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
